name: End-of-Life Care Planning Intake
description: End-of-life care planning intake for palliative care teams, social workers, and clinical staff supporting a patient and family through advance care planning and end-of-life care decisions. Evaluates the patient's prognosis, their values and goals, the current advance care planning status, the family support, and the care setting preferences to produce an end-of-life planning profile with goals of care summary and care coordination requirements. Not medical advice.

privacy.disclosure: A summary of this session will be available for review.
